'''âh-m-m-ch''' ('''kahammechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phantomize|phantomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phantomize|phantomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-m-m-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kahammechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihamechoko|thihamechoko]] || [[word:jihamechoko|jihamechoko]] || [[word:shihamechoko|shihamechoko]] || [[word:kihamechoko|kihamechoko]]
